pages.title: test page

checklist.label: All assets self-hosted (no Webflow CDN runtime deps)
Custom 404 page exists
checklist.details: Add src/pages/404.astro for a branded 404 instead of Vercel default.

checklist.label: DNS for kolo.xyz ready to switch to Vercel
checklist.details: Manual step before launch — add domain in Vercel project, update DNS at registrar.

checklist.label: kolo.in → kolo.xyz redirect set up
checklist.details: 120 internal links point at https://kolo.in/... — those need to resolve after the cutover.

checklist.label: sitemap.xml accessible
checklist.details: Astro can generate a sitemap via @astrojs/sitemap, or copy sitemap.xml from kolo.xyz into public/.

checklist.label: robots.txt configured
checklist.details: Add public/robots.txt to allow indexing on prod and block on preview.

checklist.label: Forms verified or replaced
checklist.details: 32 form tags total. Most are likely Finsweet cookie consent (frontend only). 6 wf-form references — those would post to webflow.com and break after cutover.

checklist.label: GA4 / GTM wired up
checklist.details: Both GA4 and GTM detected on homepage.
